{{Quote|Maybe a permanent presence here is what you people really need…some good, healthy discipline.|Captain Turrant|<ref name="Tales 23" />}}
'''Turrant''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] some time before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Tales 23" />

==Biography==
The [[Officer/Legends|officer]] was [[Garrison/Legends|stationed]] in a [[Gus Talon settlement|settlement]] on the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Gus Talon/Legends|Gus Talon]]. During the attempted arrest of a local [[Rebel cell (Gus Talon)|Rebel cell]] led by [[Rallo]], Turrant called for reinforcements from his superiors. In response to this, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] completely [[Bombing of Gus Talon|bombarded]] the [[City/Legends|town]].<ref name="Tales 23" />

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|23|Lucky (comic story)}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
